title: Should I Run the Triple Crown?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Finally...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Finally...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: It's finally time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown is right before my eyes!
There's no getting away from it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown is the biggest series of
races for Umamusume in their classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each race is a big event that, of course, Mejiro
Palmer can't very well ignore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya think? Should I run in it? Or, better
yet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we both race? We're in the same year,
after all!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
That's a no from me, sis. I've already decided I'm
going for sprints! ☆ You should totally run it,
though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see... What about you, Trainer? You for it or
against it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Figures you'd say that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hm... What to do... All things considered...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I should probably do it. Running in the Triple
Crown is, like, what Mejiros are expected to do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But what happens if I get out there and flub it? I
might end up being an embarrassment to the
Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: All right, hold on. I gotta think simple. I'm aiming to be the best Palmer I can be, not the best Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I need to decide what's best for myself, not what's
best for the family. Hm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown is something I should
really be serious about, right?
choice_data_list: I'd say that's the typical approach.
I'd say that's the typical approach.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Then maybe I should run it. That's probably what's
best for me as well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Or is it? If I'm not up to snuff for that level of
running, then will it really be what's best for me?
Won't it just be a slap in the face from reality?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Agh! I need to be more optimistic! Good vibes!
Good vibes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But I can't remember a time where being
optimistic has worked out for me before. I've
never overcome anything from talent alone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally stuck! What do I do?! Somebody point
me in the right direction!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Well, like... Don't you think you're overthinking
this whole thing?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Don't think—feel! ☆ Do you wanna run or don't
you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Feel, huh? The thing is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've never been good at knowing what I want to
do. I've always done what others wanted me to
do. What do you think, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
You should decide for yourself, even if you're
not used to it.

You should decide for yourself, even if you're
not used to it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Uh, Trainer? Why do you look so serious?
choice_data_list: That's what it means to live your own way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Live my own way... That was my original goal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to leave this choice up to her. She needs
to think, learn, and decide on her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Until she can do that, I don't think she'll be able
to make any progress toward becoming the
Umamusume she wants to be.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...Got it! This is something I've to figure out for
myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
First things first, I've gotta figure out what I really
want in my heart of hearts. Hm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Nnngh... This is tough! But I'm gonna do it! So...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Gimme a little time! I'm gonna give it some
serious thought, so just give me a moment!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Palmer runs off, ears twitching.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(What do you wanna do, Palmer? Think, think,
think...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh, the weight of this responsibility is heavy as
heck! I don't wanna deal with it! But... I don't
wanna ignore it either.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I wanna laugh, not be laughed at. Aspiration,
obligation, responsibility, goals...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I got it! I know how I feel!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Mejiro Palmer asks me and
Daitaku Helios to meet her so she can deliver her
answer.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Let us have it, girl! Speak your truth! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Right! I've been thinking about whether or not I
wanna run in the Classic Triple Crown tour! And
my conclusion on my feelings is that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a moment, even the wind pauses as if in
expectation. And then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I dunno!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: You... don't know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nope! I don't know a single thing! I dunno, and
everything's a mess. Part of me wants run and part
of me's scared, and I've no idea what's up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've never been good enough, so I always just try
to keep my head down so I don't bother anyone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So even if you tell me to get in touch with my true
self and say what I really feel all of a sudden, it's
not like I can just snap my fingers and do it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Anyway, that's how I feel!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's something childish about her outburst,
but hearing her thoughts like this...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Pffft... bwahahaha! Hey, why not? ♪ Not knowing
is the best, I say! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I mean, who really knows what they know or don't
know? Us girlypops are all about the vibes,
anyway! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Vibes, huh? Yeah... You're right... I think you're
onto something there. I just gotta feel the vibes.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
If you don't know, then you don't know. And
what's wrong with that? There's still a way for you
to decide!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: There is?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Just see how you feel when the race gets
closer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You mean I should let my feelings decide? Right
before the Classic Triple Crown?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Just let your gut feeling have the final say.
If you still don't feel like running when the time
arrives...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Just send Trainer a sad emoji or something. ♪
Throwing in two or three crying ones for good
measure. ★

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What?! You want me to break the news through emojis?! But wouldn't that put you in a really tough position, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I knew it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What?! You're actually on board with that?!
choice_data_list:
If you're not into it, you won't be able to run
well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's based on her feelings or vibes or
whatever else, I want Mejiro Palmer to do what
she feels is right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And I get the feeling the Classics will be right for
her. They're the first place she can run as her
actual self.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Okay, got it. Let's talk about it again when the
races get closer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: If the vibes feel right, I'll run. Sound good?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our plans for the Classic Triple Crown is...
to run if she feels like it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Man... Is this seriously the kind of person I am?
Then again...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I guess being free really means I can do whatever
I want. Yeah... I can do whatever I want...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! What's going on?! What's this fluttering
feeling?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, I feel more alive than I ever have before!
Yikes... I'm trembling like mad too!
